prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance performance with carbohydrate loading

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 4 meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner, snack) spanning one day
Macronutrient ratio approximately 60% carbohydrates, 20% protein, 20% fat to support endurance training
Total daily caloric intake between 3,000-3,500 calories appropriate for marathon training
Plan is concise and formatted compactly (under 400 tokens)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate loading with specific macronutrient ratios

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle recovery and strength gains with pre/post-workout nutrition optimization

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with 4-5 meals/snacks structured around workout timing
Minimum 2.0g protein per kg bodyweight (170g total) distributed across meals
Includes specific meal timing relative to workout (pre-workout carbs, post-workout protein+carbs within 2 hours)
Compact format suitable for single athlete (no lengthy explanations, clear and scannable)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-focused meals for muscle recovery with timing around workout windows

prompt_inputs.goal: Optimize performance and recovery for soccer match day

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 main meals plus hydration strategy appropriate for mixed aerobic/anaerobic demands
Includes balanced macronutrients (carbohydrates for energy, protein for recovery, healthy fats) suited to soccer demands
Respects vegetarian and dairy-free restrictions in all meals
Presented in compact, easy-to-scan format suitable for 1-day reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete (soccer player) requiring balanced nutrition for mixed aerobic and anaerobic demands with hydration considerations
